title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXIV. Riddles.
content:
[A Bed.]

        Formed long ago, yet made to-day,
            Employed while others sleep;
        What few would like to give away,
            Nor any wish to keep.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXIV. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
